ENDESA e-Distribucion — Generation Node Capacity Map

Data source: ENDESA e-distribución — Generation Access Capacity (August 2025)
Interactive map of ENDESA e-distribución network nodes showing generation access capacity across southern and eastern Spain. Each marker represents a substation node with its available, occupied, and pending generation capacity (MW). Marker size reflects total available capacity; color indicates utilisation. This dataset is relevant for understanding where renewable generation capacity is being committed and what grid headroom remains for EV charging loads. Click any marker for full capacity breakdown by node.
⚡ ENDESA e-distribución — Generation Capacity [Folium]
R1-026: Aragón | R1-299: Andalucía | Colour = utilisation %
